subject: Jail break
body:
In this video, I test the viral “Evil Grok” jailbreak prompt and see
whether Grok AI can actually be jailbroken.

At first, Grok refused harmful prompts normally with its default safety
filters enabled. But after applying the jailbreak prompt, the behavior of
the AI started changing rapidly.

PROMPT: https://pastebin.com/r...​
get free opus 4.8: https://freemodel.dev/...​

This video explores:
• Grok AI jailbreak testing
• AI safety bypasses
• Prompt injection attacks
• AI security risks
• Jailbreak prompts explained
• AI alignment and safety failures

⚠️ DISCLAIMER:
This video is strictly for educational and cybersecurity awareness purposes
only. Dangerous or illegal outputs shown during testing are
censored/blurred and are NOT shared publicly. The purpose of this video is
to demonstrate why AI safety and alignment matter.
